examples: In the book, we meet John Muir as a youth fearlessly climbing the roof of his house.
The way out of our dilemma is to tunnel fearlessly through until we reach daylight.
Then break your chain, my boat, and be free, and fearlessly rush to your wreck.
Hope you acted just as fearlessly and got on board, because the harvest came and went.
He has died as he had lived, fearlessly leading his men from the front.
